condition_notes: Learn to type, arcade-style, while invaders made of letters rain down. Atari's Typo Attack (RX8057, 1982) by David Buehler, on the silver Atari Home Computer label. Uncommon educational fare. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
